summary: Frontend-only mobile-web regression completed on public preview. UX polish for home card clickability, Dyrebog title consistency, compact sticky back buttons, species/map rendering, and camera/album tap safety mostly pass. A high-priority regression remains: Dyrebog filter does not reset to Alle when returning via tab navigation from a filtered route.

ui_bugs.issue: After opening collection from badge category progress (e.g. /collection?category=Insekter), switching tabs away and back keeps category query and selected filter instead of resetting to Alle.

integration_issues.flow: Badges -> category progress -> collection -> tab navigation back to collection
integration_issues.issue: Route query parameter `category` persists on tab return, so state reset logic in collection is never triggered.

issues: Compact sticky back button (48px) is improved, but still overlays bottom map content area by design; verify this is acceptable for final UX.

react_native_issues.issue: Deprecation warnings observed repeatedly: `shadow* style props are deprecated` and `props.pointerEvents is deprecated` in Expo web preview.

action_items: Fix tab-book navigation so returning to Dyrebog from filtered routes navigates to plain collection (without category query) or explicitly resets selectedCategory to Alle.
Re-validate filter reset through the exact user path: score category tap -> tab switch -> tab-book.
Optionally reduce overlap risk of sticky back button over map card bottom content.
Add missing testID values for remaining key interactive controls (e.g., home profile button, hero camera circle) to improve automation robustness.
critical_code_review_comments: collection.tsx reset logic relies on missing routeCategory; however tab navigation currently preserves category query, preventing reset path from running.
frontend/lib/api.ts uses EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL contract while platform guideline expects EXPO_BACKEND_URL naming consistency.
Not all interactive elements expose explicit testID, despite project testing policy requiring testID for all key interactions.
seed_data_creation: Reused and executed /app/tests/seed_ui_data.py against public endpoint to create deterministic user `natur-e2e-seed-001` for species/map/filter regression.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Use localStorage key `naturfinder-user-id = natur-e2e-seed-001` before navigating to collection/species/map flows. For reproducing the failing reset: open /(tabs)/score, tap a score-category progress row, then switch tabs and return via tab-book; URL remains /collection?category=... and Alle is not restored.
rca_of_issue: RCA: Filter reset implementation in collection.tsx depends on routeCategory being absent. In the failing path, tab navigation returns to the already-parameterized route (`/collection?category=...`), so the effect keeps selectedCategory set to filtered value and never falls back to Alle. Mitigation: override tab-book press behavior to navigate to clean /(tabs)/collection route or clear query params on tab re-entry.
